title: I'm the world's only truly profesional endurance athlete

enrichment.summary: Kyle argues he is the world's only truly professional endurance athlete because he plans to combine daily cycling/triathlon training with continuous audiobook listening, calling this the 'Sega formula' — a self-reinforcing loop where audiobooks motivate exercise and exercise opens the brain to better absorb knowledge. He contends this model makes traditional athletic training look incomplete by comparison, and predicts it will become a cultural norm by 2019.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: the single best way to get smart and the key to truly professional endurance athletics
wasteful and inefficient compared to learning while riding a bike
inferior to simply riding all day every day
not truly professional because they only engage publicly around races, not daily

stances.topic: laws restricting earphone use while cycling
stances.position: absurd and anti-intellectual, equivalent to banning speech
wasteful; money should instead buy everyone bikes
counterproductive; better to be sober while riding so you retain what you hear
athletes who discuss what they learn from audiobooks will become bigger cultural stars than pure performance athletes

entities: Decline and Fall of the Roman Empire (book)
